title: 3. Focus on the following key areas in your feedback:
content:
3. Focus on the following key areas in your feedback:

⸻

Higher-Order Concerns (Choose at least 3):
• Thesis & Argument – Is the main idea clear and well-supported?
• Organization & Flow – Is there logical structure and smooth transitions?
• Evidence & Support – Are comparisons backed up with meaningful examples?

Lower-Order Concerns (Optional but helpful):
• Grammar & Clarity – Any recurring issues or confusing phrasing?
• APA Format – Are citations used correctly?

⸻

PEER REVIEW LETTER TEMPLATE

⸻

Dear [Peer’s Name],

I really enjoyed reading your essay, ”[Essay Title].” You did a great job with [mention something specific you liked, such as the topic choice, a strong thesis, or an engaging example].

⸻

🧠 Higher-Order Concern 1: Thesis & Argument

Your thesis is [clear/needs clarification] because [explain why]. I think your main idea could be improved by [give a concrete suggestion or note a strength]. For example, in your introduction, you wrote: “[quote or summarize thesis].” I understood that to mean [your interpretation]. You might consider clarifying [specific part].
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 2 (chunk 2/11)
